title: Verify Preorder Serialization of a Binary Tree
hints: Focus on the balance between available slots for children and consumed slots as you scan the string left to right.
Use a counter tracking available slots: start with 1, decrement by 1 for each node, and add 2 for each non-null value.
If the counter drops below zero at any point, or isn't exactly zero at the end, the serialization is invalid.
